com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.PeriodicSchedule;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.RollConventions;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.Schedule;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.SchedulePeriod;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.StubConvention;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Product;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\n\n/**\n * A CDS (portfolio) index product. \n * <p>\n * A CDS index is a portofolio of single name credit default swaps. \n * The protection buyer periodically pays fixed coupons to the protection seller until the expiry, \n * and in return, the protection buyer receives the bond of a defaulted constituent legal entity for par.  \n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class CdsIndex\n    implements Product, Resolvable<ResolvedCdsIndex>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the CDS index is buy or sell.\n   * <p>\n   * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection, where the fixed coupon is paid\n   * and the protection is received  in the event of default.\n   * A value of 'Sell' implies selling protection, where the fixed coupon is received\n   * and the protection is paid in the event of default.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final BuySell buySell;\n  /**\n   * The CDS index identifier.\n   * <p>\n   * This identifier is used to refer this CDS index product.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final StandardId cdsIndexId;\n  /**\n   * The legal entity identifiers.\n   * <p>\n   * These identifiers refer to the reference legal entities of the CDS index.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ImmutableList<StandardId> legalEntityIds;\n  /**\n   * The currency of the CDS index.\n   * <p>\n   * The amounts of the notional are expressed in terms of this currency.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Currency currency;\n  /**\n   * The notional amount, must be non-negative.\n   * <p>\n   * The fixed notional amount applicable during the lifetime of the CDS.\n   * The currency of the notional is specified by {@code currency}.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegativeOrZero\")\n  private final double notional;\n  /**\n   * The payment schedule.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to define the payment periods.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PeriodicSchedule paymentSchedule;\n  /**\n   * The fixed coupon rate.\n   * <p>\n   * This must be represented in decimal form.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegative\")\n  private final double fixedRate;\n  /**\n   * The day count convention.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Act/360'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DayCount dayCount;\n  /**\n   * The payment on default.\n   * <p>\n   * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'AccruedPremium'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\n  /**\n   * The protection start of the day.\n   * <p>\n   * When the protection starts on the start date.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Beginning'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   * <p>\n   * The step-in date is also called protection effective date.\n   * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS index contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 1 calendar day.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   * <p>\n   * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS index contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 3 business days in the calendar of the payment schedule.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance of a standardized CDS index.\n   * \n   * @param buySell  buy or sell\n   * @param cdsIndexId  the CDS index ID\n   * @param legalEntityIds  the legal entity IDs\n   * @param currency  the currency\n   * @param notional  the notional\n   * @param startDate  the start date\n   * @param endDate  the end date\n   * @param calendar  the calendar\n   * @param paymentFrequency  the payment frequency\n   * @param fixedRate  the fixed coupon rate\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static CdsIndex of(\n      BuySell buySell,\n      StandardId cdsIndexId,\n      List<StandardId> legalEntityIds,\n      Currency currency,\n      double notional,\n      LocalDate startDate,\n      LocalDate endDate,\n      Frequency paymentFrequency,\n      HolidayCalendarId calendar,\n      double fixedRate) {\n\n    PeriodicSchedule accrualSchedule = PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n        .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(BusinessDayConventions.FOLLOWING, calendar))\n        .startDate(startDate)\n        .endDate(endDate)\n        .startDateBusinessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n        .endDateBusinessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n        .frequency(paymentFrequency)\n        .rollConvention(RollConventions.NONE)\n        .stubConvention(StubConvention.SMART_INITIAL)\n        .build();\n    return new CdsIndex(\n        buySell,\n        cdsIndexId,\n        legalEntityIds,\n        currency,\n        notional,\n        accrualSchedule,\n        fixedRate,\n        DayCounts.ACT_360,\n        PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM,\n        ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING,\n        DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1),\n        DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, calendar));\n  }\n\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.dayCount = DayCounts.ACT_360;\n    builder.paymentOnDefault = PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM;\n    builder.protectionStart = ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING;\n    builder.stepinDateOffset = DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ImmutableSet<Currency> allCurrencies() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(currency);\n  }\n\n  @ImmutablePreBuild\n  private static void preBuild(Builder builder) {\n    if (builder.settlementDateOffset == null && builder.paymentSchedule != null) {\n      builder.settlementDateOffset =\n          DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, builder.paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().getCalendar());\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsIndex resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    Schedule adjustedSchedule = paymentSchedule.createSchedule(refData);\n    ImmutableList.Builder<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> accrualPeriods = ImmutableList.builder();\n    int nPeriods = adjustedSchedule.size();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nPeriods - 1; i++) {\n      SchedulePeriod period = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(i);\n      accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n          .startDate(period.getStartDate())\n          .endDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .unadjustedStartDate(period.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n          .unadjustedEndDate(period.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n          .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : period.getStartDate())\n          .effectiveEndDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getEndDate().minusDays(1) : period.getEndDate())\n          .paymentDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .notional(notional)\n          .currency(currency)\n          .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n          .yearFraction(period.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n          .build());\n    }\n    // last period - accrual end is modified\n    SchedulePeriod lastPeriod = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(nPeriods - 1);\n    LocalDate accEndDate = protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getEndDate().plusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getEndDate();\n    SchedulePeriod modifiedPeriod = lastPeriod.toBuilder().endDate(accEndDate).build();\n    accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n        .startDate(modifiedPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .endDate(modifiedPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .unadjustedStartDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n        .unadjustedEndDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n        .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .effectiveEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .paymentDate(paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().adjust(lastPeriod.getEndDate(), refData))\n        .notional(notional)\n        .currency(currency)\n        .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n        .yearFraction(modifiedPeriod.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n        .build());\n    ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods = accrualPeriods.build();\n\n    return ResolvedCdsIndex.builder()\n        .buySell(buySell)\n        .cdsIndexId(cdsIndexId)\n        .legalEntityIds(legalEntityIds)\n        .protectionStart(protectionStart)\n        .paymentOnDefault(paymentOnDefault)\n        .paymentPeriods(paymentPeriods)\n        .protectionEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .settlementDateOffset(settlementDateOffset)\n        .stepinDateOffset(stepinDateOffset)\n        .dayCount(dayCount)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for for pricing.\n * <p>\n * This is the resolved form of {@link CdsIndex} and is an input to the pricers.\n * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedCdsIndex} from a {@code CdsIndex}\n * using {@link CdsIndex#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class ResolvedCdsIndex\n    implements ResolvedProduct, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the CDS index is buy or sell.\n   * <p>\n   * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection, where the fixed coupon is paid\n   * and the protection is received  in the event of default.\n   * A value of 'Sell' implies selling protection, where the fixed coupon is received\n   * and the protection is paid in the event of default.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final BuySell buySell;\n  /**\n   * The CDS index identifier.\n   * <p>\n   * This identifier is used to refer this CDS index product.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final StandardId cdsIndexId;\n  /**\n   * The legal entity identifiers.\n   * <p>\n   * These identifiers refer to the reference legal entities of the CDS index.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ImmutableList<StandardId> legalEntityIds;\n  /**\n   * The periodic payments based on the fixed rate.\n   * <p>\n   * Each payment period represents part of the life-time of the leg.\n   * In most cases, the periods do not overlap. However, since each payment period\n   * is essentially independent the data model allows overlapping periods.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notEmpty\")\n  private final ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods;\n  /**\n   * The protection end date.\n   * <p>\n   * This may be different from the accrual end date of the last payment period in {@code periodicPayments}.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalDate protectionEndDate;\n  /**\n   * The day count convention.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DayCount dayCount;\n  /**\n   * The payment on default.\n   * <p>\n   * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\n  /**\n   * The protection start of the day.\n   * <p>\n   * When the protection starts on the start date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   * <p>\n   * The step-in date is also called protection effective date. \n   * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS index contracts. \n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   * <p>\n   * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS index contracts.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains the accrual start date.\n   * <p>\n   * In general this is different from the protection start date. \n   * Use {@code stepinDateOffset} to compute the protection start date.\n   * \n   * @return the accrual start date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getAccrualStartDate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getStartDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the accrual end date.\n   * \n   * @return the accrual end date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getAccrualEndDate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getEndDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the notional.\n   * \n   * @return the notional\n   */\n  public double getNotional() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getNotional();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the currency.\n   * \n   * @return the currency\n   */\n  public Currency getCurrency() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the fixed coupon rate.\n   * \n   * @return the fixed rate\n   */\n  public double getFixedRate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getFixedRate();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains the effective start date from the step-in date. \n   * \n   * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n   * @return the effective start date\n   */\n  public LocalDate calculateEffectiveStartDate(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n    LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\n    return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the settlement date from the valuation date.\n   * \n   * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n   * @param refData  the reference data to use\n   * @return the settlement date\n   */\n  public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\n   * <p>\n   * The search is performed using unadjusted dates.\n   * \n   * @param date  the date to find the period for\n   * @return the period, empty if not found\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if more than one period matches\n   */\n  public Optional<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> findPeriod(LocalDate date) {\n    return paymentPeriods.stream()\n        .filter(p -> p.contains(date))\n        .reduce(ensureOnlyOne());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the accrued premium per fractional spread for unit notional.\n   * \n   * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n   * @return the accrued year fraction\n   */\n  public double accruedYearFraction(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n    if (stepinDate.isBefore(getAccrualStartDate())) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    if (stepinDate.isEqual(getAccrualEndDate())) {\n      return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getYearFraction();\n    }\n    CreditCouponPaymentPeriod period = findPeriod(stepinDate)\n        .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException(\"Date outside range\"));\n    return dayCount.relativeYearFraction(period.getStartDate(), stepinDate);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Reduce this instance to {@code ResolvedCds}.\n   * <p>\n   * The resultant object is used for pricing CDS index products under the homogeneous pool assumption on constituent  \n   * credit curves. \n   * \n   * @return the CDS product\n   */\n  public ResolvedCds toSingleNameCds() {\n    return ResolvedCds.builder()\n        .buySell(getBuySell())\n        .dayCount(getDayCount())\n        .legalEntityId(getCdsIndexId())\n        .paymentOnDefault(getPaymentOnDefault())\n        .paymentPeriods(getPaymentPeriods())\n        .protectionEndDate(getProtectionEndDate())\n        .protectionStart(getProtectionStart())\n        .stepinDateOffset(getStepinDateOffset())\n        .settlementDateOffset(getSettlementDateOffset())\n        .build();\n  }\n\n loss}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the currency of the CDS, which is limited to be single-currency.\n */\npublic class CdsTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<CdsTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01CalibratedSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01CalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01MarketQuoteSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01MarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.UNIT_PRICE, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::unitPrice)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.PRINCIPAL, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::principal)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.IR01_CALIBRATED_PARALLEL, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::ir01CalibratedParallel)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.IR01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::ir01CalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.IR01_MARKET_QUOTE_PARALLEL, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::ir01MarketQuoteParallel)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.IR01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::ir01MarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.CS01_PARALLEL, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::cs01Parallel)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.CS01_BUCKETED, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::cs01Bucketed)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.RECOVERY01, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::recovery01)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.JUMP_TO_DEFAULT, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::jumpToDefault)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.EXPECTED_LOSS, CdsMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::expectedLoss)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, rd) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public CdsTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<CdsTrade> targetType() {\n    return CdsTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      CdsTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    Cds product = trade.getProduct();\n    StandardId legalEntityId = product.getLegalEntityId();\n    Currency currency = product.getCurrency();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup lookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedCdsTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n\n    // use lookup to query market data\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup ledLookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for CdsTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, marketData, refData));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n ReferenceData refData);\n  }\n\n}\n","numLines":179,"startLine":1,"totalLines":179}}}

Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsIndexTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsIndexTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    CdsIndex product = trade.getProduct();\n    StandardId legalEntityId = product.getCdsIndexId();\n    Currency currency = product.getCurrency();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup lookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsIndexTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedCdsIndexTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n\n    // use lookup to query market data\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup ledLookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for CdsIndexTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, marketData, refData));\n  }\n\n com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.StubConvention;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Product;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\n\n/**\n * A CDS tranche product representing a slice of a CDS index portfolio.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche is defined by attachment and detachment points on the loss distribution\n * of the underlying CDS index. It represents synthetic CDO (Collateralized Debt Obligation)\n * tranche exposure.\n * <p>\n * The attachment point defines the lower bound and the detachment point defines the upper bound\n * of the tranche's exposure to portfolio losses, expressed as fractions of the notional (0.0-1.0).\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class CdsTranche\n    implements Product, Resolvable<ResolvedCdsTranche>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the CDS tranche is buy or sell.\n   * <p>\n   * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection on the tranche.\n   * A value of 'Sell' implies selling protection on the tranche.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final BuySell buySell;\n  /**\n   * The CDS index identifier of the underlying portfolio.\n   * <p>\n   * This identifier refers to the underlying CDS index.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final StandardId cdsIndexId;\n  /**\n   * The legal entity identifiers.\n   * <p>\n   * These identifiers refer to the reference legal entities of the underlying CDS index.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ImmutableList<StandardId> legalEntityIds;\n  /**\n   * The attachment point of the tranche (0.0 to 1.0).\n   * <p>\n   * The tranche starts absorbing losses when the cumulative loss rate of the\n   * portfolio exceeds this level.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double attachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The detachment point of the tranche (0.0 to 1.0).\n   * <p>\n   * The tranche is fully exhausted when the cumulative loss rate of the\n   * portfolio exceeds this level.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double detachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The currency of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The amounts of the notional are expressed in terms of this currency.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Currency currency;\n  /**\n   * The notional amount, must be non-negative.\n   * <p>\n   * The fixed notional amount applicable during the lifetime of the tranche.\n   * The currency of the notional is specified by {@code currency}.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegativeOrZero\")\n  private final double notional;\n  /**\n   * The payment schedule.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to define the payment periods.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PeriodicSchedule paymentSchedule;\n  /**\n   * The fixed coupon rate.\n   * <p>\n   * This must be represented in decimal form.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegative\")\n  private final double fixedRate;\n  /**\n   * The day count convention.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Act/360'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DayCount dayCount;\n  /**\n   * The payment on default.\n   * <p>\n   * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'AccruedPremium'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\n  /**\n   * The protection start of the day.\n   * <p>\n   * When the protection starts on the start date.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Beginning'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   * <p>\n   * The step-in date is also called protection effective date.\n   * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS index contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 1 calendar day.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   * <p>\n   * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS index contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 3 business days in the calendar of the payment schedule.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance of a standardized CDS tranche.\n   *\n   * @param buySell  buy or sell\n   * @param cdsIndexId  the CDS index ID\n   * @param legalEntityIds  the legal entity IDs\n   * @param attachmentPoint  the attachment point (0.0-1.0)\n   * @param detachmentPoint  the detachment point (0.0-1.0), must exceed attachment point\n   * @param currency  the currency\n   * @param notional  the notional\n   * @param startDate  the start date\n   * @param endDate  the end date\n   * @param paymentFrequency  the payment frequency\n   * @param calendar  the calendar\n   * @param fixedRate  the fixed coupon rate\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static CdsTranche of(\n      BuySell buySell,\n      StandardId cdsIndexId,\n      List<StandardId> legalEntityIds,\n      double attachmentPoint,\n      double detachmentPoint,\n      Currency currency,\n      double notional,\n      LocalDate startDate,\n      LocalDate endDate,\n      Frequency paymentFrequency,\n      HolidayCalendarId calendar,\n      double fixedRate) {\n\n    PeriodicSchedule accrualSchedule = PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n        .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(BusinessDayConventions.FOLLOWING, calendar))\n        .startDate(startDate)\n        .endDate(endDate)\n        .startDateBusinessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n        .endDateBusinessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n        .frequency(paymentFrequency)\n        .rollConvention(RollConventions.NONE)\n        .stubConvention(StubConvention.SMART_INITIAL)\n        .build();\n    return new CdsTranche(\n        buySell,\n        cdsIndexId,\n        legalEntityIds,\n        attachmentPoint,\n        detachmentPoint,\n        currency,\n        notional,\n        accrualSchedule,\n        fixedRate,\n        DayCounts.ACT_360,\n        PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM,\n        ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING,\n        DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1),\n        DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, calendar));\n  }\n\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.dayCount = DayCounts.ACT_360;\n    builder.paymentOnDefault = PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM;\n    builder.protectionStart = ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING;\n    builder.stepinDateOffset = DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1);\n  }\n\n  @ImmutablePreBuild\n  private static void preBuild(Builder builder) {\n    if (builder.settlementDateOffset == null && builder.paymentSchedule != null) {\n      builder.settlementDateOffset =\n          DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, builder.paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().getCalendar());\n    }\n  }\n\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    ArgChecker.inRangeInclusive(attachmentPoint, 0d, 1d, \"attachmentPoint\");\n    ArgChecker.inRangeInclusive(detachmentPoint, 0d, 1d, \"detachmentPoint\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(attachmentPoint < detachmentPoint,\n        \"attachmentPoint '{}' must be less than detachmentPoint '{}'\", attachmentPoint, detachmentPoint);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ImmutableSet<Currency> allCurrencies() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsTranche resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    Schedule adjustedSchedule = paymentSchedule.createSchedule(refData);\n    ImmutableList.Builder<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> accrualPeriods = ImmutableList.builder();\n    int nPeriods = adjustedSchedule.size();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nPeriods - 1; i++) {\n      SchedulePeriod period = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(i);\n      accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n          .startDate(period.getStartDate())\n          .endDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .unadjustedStartDate(period.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n          .unadjustedEndDate(period.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n          .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : period.getStartDate())\n          .effectiveEndDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getEndDate().minusDays(1) : period.getEndDate())\n          .paymentDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .notional(notional)\n          .currency(currency)\n          .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n          .yearFraction(period.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n          .build());\n    }\n    // last period - accrual end is modified\n    SchedulePeriod lastPeriod = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(nPeriods - 1);\n    LocalDate accEndDate = protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getEndDate().plusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getEndDate();\n    SchedulePeriod modifiedPeriod = lastPeriod.toBuilder().endDate(accEndDate).build();\n    accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n        .startDate(modifiedPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .endDate(modifiedPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .unadjustedStartDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n        .unadjustedEndDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n        .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .effectiveEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .paymentDate(paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().adjust(lastPeriod.getEndDate(), refData))\n        .notional(notional)\n        .currency(currency)\n        .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n        .yearFraction(modifiedPeriod.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n        .build());\n    ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods = accrualPeriods.build();\n\n    return ResolvedCdsTranche.builder()\n        .buySell(buySell)\n        .cdsIndexId(cdsIndexId)\n        .legalEntityIds(legalEntityIds)\n        .attachmentPoint(attachmentPoint)\n        .detachmentPoint(detachmentPoint)\n        .protectionStart(protectionStart)\n        .paymentOnDefault(paymentOnDefault)\n        .paymentPeriods(paymentPeriods)\n        .protectionEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .settlementDateOffset(settlementDateOffset)\n        .stepinDateOffset(stepinDateOffset)\n        .dayCount(dayCount)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code CdsTranche}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static the loss distribution\n * of the underlying CDS index. It represents synthetic CDO (Collateralized Debt Obligation)\n * tranche exposure.\n * <p>\n * The attachment point defines the lower bound and the detachment point defines the upper bound\n * of the tranche's exposure to portfolio losses, expressed as fractions of the notional (0.0-1.0).\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class CdsTranche\n    implements Product, Resolvable<ResolvedCdsTranche>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the CDS tranche is buy or sell.\n   * <p>\n   * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection on the tranche.\n   * A value of 'Sell' implies selling protection on the tranche.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final BuySell buySell;\n  /**\n   * The CDS index identifier of the underlying portfolio.\n   * <p>\n   * legalEntityIds;\n  /**\n   * The attachment point of the tranche (0.0 to 1.0).\n   * <p>\n   * The tranche starts absorbing losses when the cumulative loss rate of the\n   * portfolio exceeds this level.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double attachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The detachment point of the tranche (0.0 to 1.0).\n   * <p>\n   * The tranche is fully exhausted when the cumulative loss rate of the\n   * portfolio exceeds this level.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double detachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The currency of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The amounts of the notional are expressed in terms of this currency.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Currency currency;\n  /**\n   * The notional amount, must be non-negative.\n   * <p>\n   * The fixed notional amount applicable during the lifetime of the tranche.\n   * The currency of the notional is specified by {@code currency}.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegativeOrZero\")\n  private final double notional;\n  /**\n   * The payment schedule.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to define the payment periods.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PeriodicSchedule paymentSchedule;\n  /**\n   * The fixed coupon rate.\n   * <p>\n   * This must be represented in decimal form.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegative\")\n  private final double fixedRate;\n  /**\n   * The day count convention.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Act/360'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DayCount dayCount;\n  /**\n   * The payment on default.\n   * <p>\n   * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'AccruedPremium'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\n  /**\n   * The protection start of the day.\n   * <p>\n   * When the protection starts on the start date.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Beginning'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   * <p>\n   * The step-in date is also called protection effective date.\n   * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS index contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 1 calendar day.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   * <p>\n   * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS index contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 3 business days in the calendar of the payment schedule.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance of a standardized CDS tranche.\n   *\n   * @param buySell  buy or sell\n   * @param cdsIndexId  the CDS index ID\n   * @param legalEntityIds  the legal entity IDs\n   * @param attachmentPoint  the attachment point (0.0-1.0)\n   * @param detachmentPoint  the detachment point (0.0-1.0), must exceed attachment point\n   * @param currency  the currency\n   * @param notional  the notional\n   * @param startDate  the start date\n   * @param endDate  the end date\n   * @param paymentFrequency  the payment frequency\n   * @param calendar  the calendar\n   * @param fixedRate  the fixed coupon rate\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static CdsTranche of(\n      BuySell buySell,\n      StandardId cdsIndexId,\n      List<StandardId> legalEntityIds,\n      double attachmentPoint,\n      double detachmentPoint,\n      Currency currency,\n      double notional,\n      LocalDate startDate,\n      LocalDate endDate,\n      Frequency paymentFrequency,\n      HolidayCalendarId calendar,\n      double fixedRate) {\n\n    PeriodicSchedule accrualSchedule = PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n        .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(BusinessDayConventions.FOLLOWING, calendar))\n        .startDate(startDate)\n        .endDate(endDate)\n        .startDateBusinessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n        .endDateBusinessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n        .frequency(paymentFrequency)\n        .rollConvention(RollConventions.NONE)\n        .stubConvention(StubConvention.SMART_INITIAL)\n        .build();\n    return new CdsTranche(\n        buySell,\n        cdsIndexId,\n        legalEntityIds,\n        attachmentPoint,\n        detachmentPoint,\n        currency,\n        notional,\n        accrualSchedule,\n        fixedRate,\n        DayCounts.ACT_360,\n        PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM,\n        ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING,\n        DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1),\n        DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, calendar));\n  }\n\n builder.protectionStart = ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING;\n    builder.stepinDateOffset = DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1);\n  }\n\n  @ImmutablePreBuild\n  private static void preBuild(Builder builder) {\n    if (builder.settlementDateOffset == null && builder.paymentSchedule != null) {\n      builder.settlementDateOffset =\n          DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, allCurrencies() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsTranche resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    Schedule adjustedSchedule = paymentSchedule.createSchedule(refData);\n    ImmutableList.Builder<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> accrualPeriods = ImmutableList.builder();\n    int nPeriods = adjustedSchedule.size();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nPeriods - 1; i++) {\n      SchedulePeriod period = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(i);\n      accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n          .startDate(period.getStartDate())\n          .endDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .unadjustedStartDate(period.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n          .unadjustedEndDate(period.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n          .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : period.getStartDate())\n          .effectiveEndDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getEndDate().minusDays(1) : period.getEndDate())\n          .paymentDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .notional(notional)\n          .currency(currency)\n          .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n          .yearFraction(period.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n          .build());\n    }\n    // last period - accrual end is modified\n    SchedulePeriod lastPeriod = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(nPeriods - 1);\n    LocalDate accEndDate = protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getEndDate().plusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getEndDate();\n    SchedulePeriod modifiedPeriod = lastPeriod.toBuilder().endDate(accEndDate).build();\n    accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n        .startDate(modifiedPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .endDate(modifiedPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .unadjustedStartDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n        .unadjustedEndDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n        .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .effectiveEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .paymentDate(paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().adjust(lastPeriod.getEndDate(), refData))\n        .notional(notional)\n        .currency(currency)\n        .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n        .yearFraction(modifiedPeriod.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n        .build());\n    ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods = accrualPeriods.build();\n\n    return ResolvedCdsTranche.builder()\n        .buySell(buySell)\n        .cdsIndexId(cdsIndexId)\n        .legalEntityIds(legalEntityIds)\n        .attachmentPoint(attachmentPoint)\n        .detachmentPoint(detachmentPoint)\n        .protectionStart(protectionStart)\n        .paymentOnDefault(paymentOnDefault)\n        .paymentPeriods(paymentPeriods)\n        .protectionEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .settlementDateOffset(settlementDateOffset)\n        .stepinDateOffset(stepinDateOffset)\n        .dayCount(dayCount)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n detachment point of the tranche (0.0 to 1.0).\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double detachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The periodic payments based on the fixed rate.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notEmpty\")\n  private final ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods;\n  /**\n   * The protection end date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = the accrual start date.\n   *\n   * @return the accrual start date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getAccrualStartDate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getStartDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the accrual end date.\n   *\n   * @return the accrual end date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getAccrualEndDate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getEndDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the notional.\n   *\n   * @return the notional\n   */\n  public double getNotional() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getNotional();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the currency.\n   *\n   *  */\n  public double getFixedRate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getFixedRate();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains the stepinDate) {\n    LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\n    return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the settlement date from the valuation date.\n   *\n   * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n   * @param refData  the reference data to use\n   * @return the settlement date\n   */\n  public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\n   *\n   * @param date  the date to find the period for\n   * @return the period, empty if not found\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if more than one period matches\n   */\n  public Optional<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> findPeriod(LocalDate date) {\n    return paymentPeriods.stream()\n        .filter(p -> p.contains(date))\n        .reduce(ensureOnlyOne());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the accrued premium per fractional spread for unit notional.\n   *\n   * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n   * @return the accrued year fraction\n   */\n  public double accruedYearFraction(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n    if (stepinDate.isBefore(getAccrualStartDate())) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    if (stepinDate.isEqual(getAccrualEndDate())) {\n      return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getYearFraction();\n    }\n    CreditCouponPaymentPeriod period = findPeriod(stepinDate)\n        .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException(\"Date outside range\"));\n    return dayCount.relativeYearFraction(period.getStartDate(), stepinDate);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Reduce this instance to a {@code {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01FSFU19QNqSqxeJGFwZxfPb","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01XhSWp11KwHUa7aiSC4pu3H","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java","content":"/*\n * Copyright (C) 2024 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTranche;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for CDS tranche products based on ISDA standard model.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche is priced using the underlying CDS index curves.\n * The tranche absorbs losses between the attachment and detachment points of the underlying\n * portfolio loss distribution.\n * <p>\n * The present value of the tranche is computed by scaling the underlying index PV by the\n * tranche width (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint), which represents the expected loss\n * allocation to this specific tranche slice.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying index pricer used to price the base CDS index.\n   */\n  private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer indexProductPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.indexProductPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return indexProductPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is computed by pricing the underlying CDS index as a single-name CDS\n   * and scaling it by the tranche width. The tranche width represents the fraction of the\n   * portfolio losses that this tranche absorbs (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the tranche\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    Currency currency = cdsTranche.getCurrency();\n    StandardId indexId = cdsTranche.getCdsIndexId();\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS index as a homogeneous single-name CDS\n    CurrencyAmount indexPv = indexProductPricer.presentValue(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    // Scale by tranche width to get the tranche-specific present value\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPv.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade includes both the product present value and\n   * the present value of the upfront fee (if any).\n   *\n   * @param trade  the tranche trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(trade, \"trade\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount upfrontFeePv =\n          upfrontPricer.presentValue(trade.getUpfrontFee().get(), ratesProvider.discountFactors(productPv.getCurrency()));\n      return productPv.plus(upfrontFeePv);\n    }\n    return productPv;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the CDS tranche, which is the present value per unit notional.\n   * <p>\n   * The price is computed as the tranche-scaled index price.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    double indexPrice = indexProductPricer.price(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPrice * trancheWidth;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the point sensitivities of the present value of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivities are computed by scaling the underlying index sensitivities\n   * by the tranche width.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the point sensitivities\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    PointSensitivities indexSens = indexProductPricer.presentValueSensitivity(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexSens.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n attachmentPoint), which represents the expected loss\n * allocation to this specific tranche slice.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying index pricer used to price the base CDS index.\n   */\n  private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer indexProductPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.indexProductPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return indexProductPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is computed by pricing the underlying CDS index as a single-name CDS\n   * and scaling it by the tranche width. The tranche width represents the fraction of the\n   * portfolio losses that this tranche absorbs (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the tranche\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    Currency currency = cdsTranche.getCurrency();\n    StandardId indexId = cdsTranche.getCdsIndexId();\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS index as a homogeneous single-name CDS\n    CurrencyAmount indexPv = indexProductPricer.presentValue(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    // Scale by tranche width to get the tranche-specific present value\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPv.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade includes both the product present value and\n   * the present value of the upfront fee (if any).\n   *\n   * @param trade  the tranche trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(trade, \"trade\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount upfrontFeePv =\n          upfrontPricer.presentValue(trade.getUpfrontFee().get(), ratesProvider.discountFactors(productPv.getCurrency()));\n      return productPv.plus(upfrontFeePv);\n    }\n    return productPv;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the CDS tranche, which is the present value per unit notional.\n   * <p>\n   * The price is computed as the tranche-scaled index price.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    double indexPrice = indexProductPricer.price(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPrice * trancheWidth;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the point sensitivities of the present value of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivities are computed by scaling the underlying index sensitivities\n   * by the tranche width.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the point sensitivities\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    PointSensitivities indexSens = indexProductPricer.presentValueSensitivity(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexSens.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

attachmentPoint), which represents the expected loss\n * allocation to this specific tranche slice.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying index pricer used to price the base CDS index.\n   */\n  private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer indexProductPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.indexProductPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return indexProductPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is computed by pricing the underlying CDS index as a single-name CDS\n   * and scaling it by the tranche width. The tranche width represents the fraction of the\n   * portfolio losses that this tranche absorbs (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the tranche\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    Currency currency = cdsTranche.getCurrency();\n    StandardId indexId = cdsTranche.getCdsIndexId();\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS index as a homogeneous single-name CDS\n    CurrencyAmount indexPv = get the tranche-specific present value\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPv.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * upfrontPricer.presentValue(trade.getUpfrontFee().get(), ratesProvider.discountFactors(productPv.getCurrency()));\n      return productPv.plus(upfrontFeePv);\n    }\n    return productPv;\n  }\n\n the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPrice * trancheWidth;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the point sensitivities of the present value of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The * Copyright (C) 2024 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.credit;\n\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationFunction;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.FailureReason;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.AccrualOnDefaultFormula;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.IsdaCdsTranchePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTranche;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTrancheTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on a single {@code CdsTrancheTrade} for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * An instance of {@link CreditRatesMarketDataLookup} must be specified.\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#UNIT_PRICE Unit price}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the currency of the CDS tranche, which is limited to be single-currency.\n */\npublic class CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<CdsTrancheTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The pricer for tranche trades.\n   */\n  private static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer PRICER =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.CORRECT);\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculatePresentValue)\n          .put(Measures.UNIT_PRICE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculateUnitPrice)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, rd) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<CdsTrancheTrade> targetType() {\n    return CdsTrancheTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsTrancheTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsTrancheTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    CdsTranche product = trade.getProduct();\n    StandardId legalEntityId = product.getCdsIndexId();\n    Currency currency = product.getCurrency();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup lookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n\n    // use lookup to query market data\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup ledLookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for CdsTrancheTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, marketData, refData));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // present value calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static Object calculatePresentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return marketData.scenarios().stream()\n        .map(md -> PRICER.presentValue(\n            trade,\n            md.creditRatesProvider(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider().getValuationDate(),\n            PriceType.DIRTY,\n            refData))\n        .collect(com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray.collector());\n  }\n\n  // unit price calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static Object calculateUnitPrice(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return marketData.scenarios().stream()\n        .mapToDouble(md -> PRICER.price(\n            trade.getProduct(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider().getValuationDate(),\n            PriceType.DIRTY,\n            refData))\n        .collect(com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray.collector());\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n
