com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on a single {@code CdsTrancheTrade} for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * An instance of {@link CreditRatesMarketDataLookup} must be specified.\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#UNIT_PRICE Unit price}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the currency of the CDS tranche, which is limited to be single-currency.\n */\npublic class CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<CdsTrancheTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The pricer for tranche trades.\n   */\n  private static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer PRICER =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.CORRECT);\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculatePresentValue)\n          .put(Measures.UNIT_PRICE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculateUnitPrice)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, rd) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<CdsTrancheTrade> targetType() {\n    return CdsTrancheTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsTrancheTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsTrancheTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    CdsTranche product = trade.getProduct();\n    StandardId legalEntityId = product.getCdsIndexId();\n    Currency currency = product.getCurrency();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup lookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n\n    // use lookup to query market data\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup ledLookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for CdsTrancheTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, marketData, refData));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // present value calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static Object calculatePresentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return marketData.scenarios().stream()\n        .map(md -> PRICER.presentValue(\n            trade,\n            md.creditRatesProvider(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider().getValuationDate(),\n            PriceType.DIRTY,\n            refData))\n        .collect(com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray.collector());\n  }\n\n  // unit price calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static Object calculateUnitPrice(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return marketData.scenarios().stream()\n        .mapToDouble(md -> PRICER.price(\n            trade.getProduct(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider().getValuationDate(),\n            PriceType.DIRTY,\n            refData))\n        .collect(com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray.collector());\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract Object calculate(\n        ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n        CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n        ReferenceData refData);\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTranche;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for CDS tranche products based on ISDA standard model.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche is priced using the underlying CDS index curves.\n * The tranche absorbs losses between the attachment and detachment points of the underlying\n * portfolio loss distribution.\n * <p>\n * The present value of the tranche is computed by scaling the underlying index PV by the\n * tranche width (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint), which represents the expected loss\n * allocation to this specific tranche slice.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying index pricer used to price the base CDS index.\n   */\n  private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer indexProductPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.indexProductPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return indexProductPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is computed by pricing the underlying CDS index as a single-name CDS\n   * and scaling it by the tranche width. The tranche width represents the fraction of the\n   * portfolio losses that this tranche absorbs (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the tranche\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    Currency currency = cdsTranche.getCurrency();\n    StandardId indexId = cdsTranche.getCdsIndexId();\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS index as a homogeneous single-name CDS\n    CurrencyAmount indexPv = indexProductPricer.presentValue(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    // Scale by tranche width to get the tranche-specific present value\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPv.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade includes both the product present value and\n   * the present value of the upfront fee (if any).\n   *\n   * @param trade  the tranche trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(trade, \"trade\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount upfrontFeePv =\n          upfrontPricer.presentValue(trade.getUpfrontFee().get(), ratesProvider.discountFactors(productPv.getCurrency()));\n      return productPv.plus(upfrontFeePv);\n    }\n    return productPv;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the CDS tranche, which is the present value per unit notional.\n   * <p>\n   * The price is computed as the tranche-scaled index price.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    double indexPrice = indexProductPricer.price(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPrice * trancheWidth;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the point sensitivities of the present value of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivities are computed by scaling the underlying index sensitivities\n   * by the tranche width.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the point sensitivities\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    PointSensitivityBuilder indexSens = indexProductPricer.presentValueSensitivity(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexSens.multipliedBy(trancheWidth).build();\n  }\n\n}\n","numLines":219,"startLine":1,"totalLines":219}}}

attachmentPoint), which represents the expected loss\n * allocation to this specific tranche slice.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying index pricer used to price the base CDS index.\n   */\n  private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer indexProductPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.indexProductPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return indexProductPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is computed by pricing the underlying CDS index as a single-name CDS\n   * and scaling it by the tranche width. The tranche width represents the fraction of the\n   * portfolio losses that this tranche absorbs (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the tranche\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    Currency currency = cdsTranche.getCurrency();\n    StandardId indexId = cdsTranche.getCdsIndexId();\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS index as a homogeneous single-name CDS\n    CurrencyAmount indexPv = indexProductPricer.presentValue(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    // Scale by tranche width to get the tranche-specific present value\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPv.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade includes both the product present value and\n   * the present value of the upfront fee (if any).\n   *\n   * @param trade  the tranche trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(trade, \"trade\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount upfrontFeePv =\n          upfrontPricer.presentValue(\n              trade.getUpfrontFee().get(),\n              ratesProvider.discountFactors(productPv.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors());\n      return productPv.plus(upfrontFeePv);\n    }\n    return productPv;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the CDS tranche, which is the present value per unit notional.\n   * <p>\n   * The price is computed as the tranche-scaled index price.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    double indexPrice = indexProductPricer.price(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPrice * trancheWidth;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the point sensitivities of the present value of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivities are computed by scaling the underlying index sensitivities\n   * by the tranche width.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the point sensitivities\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexSens.multipliedBy(trancheWidth).build();\n ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculatePresentValue)\n          .put(Measures.UNIT_PRICE, //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<CdsTrancheTrade> targetType() {\n    return CdsTrancheTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsTrancheTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsTrancheTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    CdsTranche product = trade.getProduct();\n    StandardId legalEntityId = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for CdsTrancheTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, marketData, refData));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // present value calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static CurrencyScenarioArray calculatePresentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n });\n  }\n\n  // unit price calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static DoubleScenarioArray calculateUnitPrice(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> {\n          CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider = marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider();\n          return PRICER.price(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, PriceType.DIRTY, refData);\n        });\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract Object calculate(\n }\n\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":316,"cache_read_input_tokens":114746,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":316,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"7e7c96de-5ebe-4434-88ab-72127ac9d703","uuid":"bf4bcf06-159f-49b7-9394-7829d1feda48"}

com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on a single {@code CdsTrancheTrade} for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * An instance of {@link CreditRatesMarketDataLookup} must be specified.\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#UNIT_PRICE Unit price}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the currency of the CDS tranche, which is limited to be single-currency.\n */\npublic class CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<CdsTrancheTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The pricer for tranche trades.\n   */\n  private static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer PRICER =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.CORRECT);\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculatePresentValue)\n          .put(Measures.UNIT_PRICE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculateUnitPrice)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, rd) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<CdsTrancheTrade> targetType() {\n    return CdsTrancheTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsTrancheTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsTrancheTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    CdsTranche product = trade.getProduct();\n    StandardId legalEntityId = product.getCdsIndexId();\n    Currency currency = product.getCurrency();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup lookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n\n    // use lookup to query market data\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup ledLookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for CdsTrancheTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, marketData, refData));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // present value calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static Object calculatePresentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return marketData.scenarios().stream()\n        .map(md -> PRICER.presentValue(\n            trade,\n            md.creditRatesProvider(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider().getValuationDate(),\n            PriceType.DIRTY,\n            refData))\n        .collect(com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray.collector());\n  }\n\n  // unit price calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static Object calculateUnitPrice(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return marketData.scenarios().stream()\n        .mapToDouble(md -> PRICER.price(\n            trade.getProduct(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider().getValuationDate(),\n            PriceType.DIRTY,\n            refData))\n        .collect(com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray.collector());\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract Object calculate(\n        ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n        CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n        ReferenceData refData);\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":21,"oldLines":11,"newStart":21,"newLines":14,"lines":[" import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;"," import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on a single {@code CdsTrancheTrade} for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * An instance of {@link CreditRatesMarketDataLookup} must be specified.\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#UNIT_PRICE Unit price}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the currency of the CDS tranche, which is limited to be single-currency.\n */\npublic class CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<CdsTrancheTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The pricer for tranche trades.\n   */\n  private static final SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculatePresentValue)\n          .put(Measures.UNIT_PRICE, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction::calculateUnitPrice)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, rd) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<CdsTrancheTrade> targetType() {\n    return CdsTrancheTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsTrancheTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsTrancheTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    CdsTranche product = trade.getProduct();\n    StandardId legalEntityId = product.getCdsIndexId();\n    Currency currency = product.getCurrency();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup lookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n\n    // use lookup to query market data\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup ledLookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for CdsTrancheTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, marketData, refData));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // present value calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static Object calculatePresentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return marketData.scenarios().stream()\n        .map(md -> PRICER.presentValue(\n            trade,\n            md.creditRatesProvider(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider().getValuationDate(),\n            PriceType.DIRTY,\n            refData))\n        .collect(com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray.collector());\n  }\n\n  // unit price calculation - loops over scenarios\n  private static Object calculateUnitPrice(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return marketData.scenarios().stream()\n        .mapToDouble(md -> PRICER.price(\n            trade.getProduct(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider(),\n            md.creditRatesProvider().getValuationDate(),\n            PriceType.DIRTY,\n            refData))\n        .collect(com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray.collector());\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n refData);\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":152,"oldLines":35,"newStart":152,"newLines":31,"lines":[" ","   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------"," attachmentPoint), which represents the expected loss\n    29→ * allocation to this specific tranche slice.\n    30→ */\n    31→public class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n    32→\n    33→  /**\n    34→   * Default implementation.\n    35→   */\n    36→  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n    37→      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n    38→\n    39→  /**\n    40→   * The underlying index pricer used to price the base CDS index.\n    41→   */\n    42→  private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer indexProductPricer;\n    43→  /**\n    44→   * The upfront fee pricer.\n    45→   */\n    46→  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n    47→\n    48→  /**\n    49→   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n    50→   *\n    51→   * @param formula  the formula\n    52→   */\n    53→  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    54→    this.indexProductPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\n    55→    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    59→  /**\n    60→   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n    61→   *\n    62→   * @return the formula\n    63→   */\n    64→  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    65→    return indexProductPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n    66→  }\n    67→\n    68→  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    69→  /**\n    70→   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n    71→   * <p>\n    72→   * The present value is computed by pricing the underlying CDS index as a single-name CDS\n    73→   * and scaling it by the tranche width. The tranche width represents the fraction of the\n    74→   * portfolio losses that this tranche absorbs (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n    75→   *\n    76→   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n    77→   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n    78→   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n    79→   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n    80→   * @param refData  the reference data\n    81→   * @return the present value of the tranche\n    82→   */\n    83→  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n    84→      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n    85→      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n    86→      LocalDate referenceDate,\n    87→      PriceType priceType,\n    88→      ReferenceData refData) {\n    89→\n    90→    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    91→    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    92→    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    93→    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    94→    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n    95→\n    96→    Currency currency = cdsTranche.getCurrency();\n    97→    StandardId indexId = cdsTranche.getCdsIndexId();\n    98→\n    99→    // Price the underlying CDS index as a homogeneous single-name CDS\n   100→    CurrencyAmount indexPv = indexProductPricer.presentValue(\n   101→        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n   102→        ratesProvider,\n   103→        referenceDate,\n   104→        priceType,\n   105→        refData);\n   106→\n   107→    // Scale by tranche width to get the tranche-specific present value\n   108→    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n   109→    return indexPv.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  /**\n   113→   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   114→   * <p>\n   115→   * The present value of the trade includes both the product present value and\n   116→   * the present value of the upfront fee (if any).\n   117→   *\n   118→   * @param trade  the tranche trade\n   119→   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   120→   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   121→   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   122→   * @param refData  the reference data\n   123→   * @return the present value of the trade\n   124→   */\n   125→  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n   126→      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n   127→      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n   128→      LocalDate referenceDate,\n   129→ attachmentPoint), which represents the expected loss\n * allocation to this specific tranche slice.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying index pricer used to price the base CDS index.\n   */\n  private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer indexProductPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.indexProductPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return indexProductPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is computed by pricing the underlying CDS index as a single-name CDS\n   * and scaling it by the tranche width. The tranche width represents the fraction of the\n   * portfolio losses that this tranche absorbs (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the tranche\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    Currency currency = cdsTranche.getCurrency();\n    StandardId indexId = cdsTranche.getCdsIndexId();\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS index as a homogeneous single-name CDS\n    CurrencyAmount indexPv = indexProductPricer.presentValue(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    // Scale by tranche width to get the tranche-specific present value\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPv.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade includes both the product present value and\n   * the present value of the upfront fee (if any).\n @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(trade, \"trade\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount upfrontFeePv =\n          upfrontPricer.presentValue(\n              trade.getUpfrontFee().get(),\n              ratesProvider.discountFactors(productPv.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors());\n      return productPv.plus(upfrontFeePv);\n    }\n    return productPv;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the CDS tranche, which is the present value per unit notional.\n   * <p>\n   * The price is computed as the tranche-scaled index price.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    double indexPrice = indexProductPricer.price(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPrice * trancheWidth;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the point sensitivities of the present value of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivities are computed by scaling the underlying index sensitivities\n   * by the tranche width.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the point sensitivities\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTranche;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for CDS tranche products based on ISDA standard model.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche is priced using the underlying CDS index curves.\n * The tranche absorbs losses between the attachment and detachment points of the underlying\n * portfolio loss distribution.\n * <p>\n * The present value of the tranche is computed by scaling the underlying index PV by the\n * tranche width (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint), which represents the expected loss\n * allocation to this specific tranche slice.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying index pricer used to price the base CDS index.\n   */\n  private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer indexProductPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.indexProductPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return indexProductPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is computed by pricing the underlying CDS index as a single-name CDS\n   * and scaling it by the tranche width. The tranche width represents the fraction of the\n   * portfolio losses that this tranche absorbs (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the tranche\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS index as a homogeneous single-name CDS\n    CurrencyAmount indexPv = indexProductPricer.presentValue(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    // Scale by tranche width to get the tranche-specific present value\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPv.multipliedBy(trancheWidth);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade includes both the product present value and\n   * the present value of the upfront fee (if any).\n   *\n   * @param trade  the tranche trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(trade, \"trade\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount upfrontFeePv =\n          upfrontPricer.presentValue(\n              trade.getUpfrontFee().get(),\n              ratesProvider.discountFactors(productPv.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors());\n      return productPv.plus(upfrontFeePv);\n    }\n    return productPv;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the CDS tranche, which is the present value per unit notional.\n   * <p>\n   * The price is computed as the tranche-scaled index price.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    double indexPrice = indexProductPricer.price(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPrice * trancheWidth;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the point sensitivities of the present value of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivities are computed by scaling the underlying index sensitivities\n   * by the tranche width.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the point sensitivities\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    PointSensitivityBuilder indexSens = indexProductPricer.presentValueSensitivity(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexSens.multipliedBy(trancheWidth).build();\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":109,"oldLines":6,"newStart":109,"newLines":26,"lines":["   /**","    * Calculates the present value of priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), priceType, refData);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade includes both the product present value and\n   * the present value of the upfront fee (if any).\n   *\n   * @param trade  the tranche trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(trade, \"trade\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = upfrontPricer.presentValue(\n              trade.getUpfrontFee().get(),\n              ratesProvider.discountFactors(productPv.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors());\n      return productPv.plus(upfrontFeePv);\n    }\n    return productPv;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the CDS tranche, which is the present value per unit notional.\n   * <p>\n   * The price is computed as the tranche-scaled index price.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type (clean or dirty)\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(priceType, \"priceType\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    double indexPrice = indexProductPricer.price(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        priceType,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexPrice * trancheWidth;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the point sensitivities of the present value of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivities are computed by scaling the underlying index sensitivities\n   * by the tranche width.\n   *\n   * @param cdsTranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the point sensitivities\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche cdsTranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.notNull(cdsTranche, \"cdsTranche\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(ratesProvider, \"ratesProvider\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(referenceDate, \"referenceDate\");\n    ArgChecker.notNull(refData, \"refData\");\n\n    PointSensitivityBuilder indexSens = indexProductPricer.presentValueSensitivity(\n        cdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex(),\n        ratesProvider,\n        referenceDate,\n        refData);\n\n    double trancheWidth = cdsTranche.getDetachmentPoint() - cdsTranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n    return indexSens.multipliedBy(trancheWidth).build();\n The `resolve()` method follows the exact same payment period construction logic as `CdsIndex.resolve()`.\n\n### modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/ResolvedCdsTranche.java\nNew file — Resolved form with same fields as `CdsTranche` (expanded payments, no schedule), plus helper methods:\n- `getAccrualStartDate()`, `getAccrualEndDate()`, `getNotional()`, `getCurrency()`, `getFixedRate()`\n- `calculateEffectiveStartDate()`, `calculateSettlementDateFromValuation()`\n- `findPeriod()`, `accruedYearFraction()`\n- `toResolvedCdsIndex()` — converts to `ResolvedCdsIndex` for pricing via the existing homogeneous pool pricer\n\n### modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/CdsTrancheTrade.java\nNew file — Trade wrapper following `CdsIndexTrade` pattern with `TradeInfo`, `CdsTranche product`, and optional `AdjustablePayment upfrontFee`. Implements `ProductTrade`, `ResolvableTrade<ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade>`. Summary includes attachment/detachment point percentages.\n\n### modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade.java\nNew file — Resolved trade with `TradeInfo`, `ResolvedCdsTranche product`, optional `Payment upfrontFee`. Implements `ResolvedTrade`.\n\n### modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java\nNew file — Pricer that:\n1. Converts `ResolvedCdsTranche` to `ResolvedCdsIndex` via `toResolvedCdsIndex()`\n2. Delegates to `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer` for the base index pricing\n3. Scales result by `trancheWidth = detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint`\n\nMethods:\n- `presentValue(ResolvedCdsTranche, ..., LocalDate, PriceType, ReferenceData)` — 5-arg version\n- `presentValue(ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade, ..., PriceType, ReferenceData)` — 4-arg convenience (uses `ratesProvider.getValuationDate()`)\n- `presentValue(ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade, ..., LocalDate, PriceType, ReferenceData)` — 5-arg with upfront fee handling\n- `price(ResolvedCdsTranche, ..., PriceType, ReferenceData)` — 4-arg convenience\n- `price(ResolvedCdsTranche, ..., LocalDate, PriceType, ReferenceData)` — 5-arg\n- `presentValueSensitivity(ResolvedCdsTranche, ..., LocalDate, ReferenceData)` — sensitivity scaled by tranche width\n\n### modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/credit/CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction.java\nNew file — Calculation function implementing `CalculationFunction<CdsTrancheTrade>`:\n- Supported measures: `PRESENT_VALUE`, `UNIT_PRICE`, `RESOLVED_TARGET`\n- Requirements: uses `CreditRatesMarketDataLookup` with `cdsIndexId` (the underlying index ID) and currency\n- Calculate: resolves trade, iterates over scenarios using `CurrencyScenarioArray.of()` and `DoubleScenarioArray.of()`\n\n## Analysis\n\n### Implementation Strategy\n\nThe CDS tranche is implemented as a synthetic CDO tranche on top of a CDS index. The key insight is that a tranche only absorbs portfolio losses between its attachment and detachment points, so the tranche PV can be approximated by scaling the full index PV by the tranche width `(detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint)`.\n\nThis \"linear scaling\" approach is a simplification of more complex CDO tranche pricing models (e.g., Gaussian copula), but it follows from the task description's stated requirement of \"expected loss between attachment/detachment points\" and leverages the existing ISDA model infrastructure.\n\n### Design Decisions\n\n1. **Leverage `toResolvedCdsIndex()`**: `ResolvedCdsTranche` has a `toResolvedCdsIndex()` method analogous to `ResolvedCdsIndex.toSingleNameCds()`. This allows re-use of the existing `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer` without duplicating pricing logic.\n\n2. **Full Joda-Beans pattern**: All classes use the full autogenerated boilerplate (Meta, Builder, property switch statements, equals/hashCode) following the exact same pattern as `CdsIndex`, `CdsIndexTrade`, etc. This ensures compatibility with Joda-Beans serialization/deserialization.\n\n3. **Hash codes in switch statements**: Property name hash codes in Meta and Builder switch statements match those already used in similar classes (e.g., `cdsIndexId` hash `-464117509` copied from `ResolvedCdsIndex`, `buySell` hash `244977400`). New properties `attachmentPoint` hash `-596543583` and `detachmentPoint` hash `-1449962107` are standard Java hashCode values for those strings.\n\n4. **4-arg and 5-arg pricer methods**: Added convenience overloads that use `ratesProvider.getValuationDate()` as the reference date, matching the pattern from `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, priceType, refData)`.\n\n5. **Calculation function simplification**: The `CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction` implements only `PRESENT_VALUE`, `UNIT_PRICE`, and `RESOLVED_TARGET` measures initially. Full CS01, IR01, and other measures could be added once a proper tranche sensitivity model is implemented.\n\n6. **Market data requirements**: The tranche uses the same market data requirements as the underlying CDS index (indexed by `cdsIndexId`). This means the same credit curve calibrated for the index is reused, consistent with the homogeneous pool assumption.\n\n### Integration with Existing Architecture\n\n- The `CdsTranche` product integrates cleanly with Strata's calc engine through `CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction`\n- The `CreditRatesMarketDataLookup` is reused as-is — no new market data infrastructure needed\n- The `ResolvedCdsTranche.toResolvedCdsIndex()` conversion enables full reuse of existing CDS index pricing infrastructure\n- The `ProductType.CDS_TRANCHE` constant follows the existing naming convention\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":569,"cache_read_input_tokens":152765,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":569,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":18,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"7e7c96de-5ebe-4434-88ab-72127ac9d703","uuid":"66cb57a0-4cca-4d17-b1c9-eb67353a883b"}

The `resolve()` method builds payment periods identically to `CdsIndex.resolve()`.\n2. **`ResolvedCdsTranche.java`** — Resolved form for pricing, with a key `toResolvedCdsIndex()` method that converts to the existing `ResolvedCdsIndex` for pricing delegation.\n3. **`CdsTrancheTrade.java`** — Trade wrapper following `CdsIndexTrade` pattern with optional upfront fee. Summary shows attachment/detachment percentages.\n4. **`ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade.java`** — Resolved trade for use by pricers.\n\n**Modified**: `ProductType.java` — Added `CDS_TRANCHE = ProductType.of(\"Cds Tranche\", \"CDS Tranche\")`.\n\n**Pricer Module** (`modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/`):\n5. **`IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java`** — Prices tranches by converting to `ResolvedCdsIndex`, pricing via `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer`, then scaling by tranche width `(detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint)`. Provides both 4-arg (convenience) and 5-arg (explicit reference date) overloads.\n\n**Measure Module** (`modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/credit/`):\n6. **`CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction.java`** — Wires tranche into the calc engine. Supports `PRESENT_VALUE`, `UNIT_PRICE`, and `RESOLVED_TARGET` measures.
